ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident occurred */,
  "state" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the incident occurred */,
  "city_or_county" INTEGER /* Reference to the city or county where the incident occurred */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address or location of the incident */,
  "killed" INTEGER /* Number of people killed in the incident */,
  "injured" INTEGER /* Number of people injured in the incident */,
  "operations" TEXT /* Operations conducted during the incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., homicide, shooting, assault) */,
  "incident_status" TEXT /* Status of the incident (e.g., ongoing, resolved, under investigation) */,
  "officer_in_charge_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the officer in charge of the incident */,
  "suspect_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the suspect(s) involved in the incident */,
  "evidence_details" TEXT /* Details of evidence collected during the incident */,
  "media_links" TEXT /* Links to media coverage or related documents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_city_or_county FOREIGN KEY ("city_or_county") REFERENCES cities_or_counties ("city_or_county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "governor_name" TEXT /* Name of the state governor */,
  "state_population_density" REAL /* Population density of the state */,
  "number_of_law_enforcement_agencies" INTEGER /* Number of law enforcement agencies in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities_or_counties" (
  "city_or_county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city or county */,
  "city_or_county_name" TEXT /* Name of the city or county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the city or county is in */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city or county */,
  "county" TEXT /* Name of the county if the location is a city within a county */,
  "mayor_name" TEXT /* Name of the mayor or county executive */,
  "number_of_law_enforcement_agencies" INTEGER /* Number of law enforcement agencies in the city or county */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the city or county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_or_county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "operation_name" TEXT /* Name of the operation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operation */,
  "operation_status" TEXT /* Status of the operation (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the operation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the operation */,
  "operation_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_operations" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operation conducted during the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id", "operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident the report is for */,
  "submitter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submitter who submitted the report */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was submitted */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Details of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., submitted, reviewed, approved) */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., initial, follow-up, final) */,
  "report_media_links" TEXT /* Links to media or evidence related to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_submitter_id FOREIGN KEY ("submitter_id") REFERENCES submitters ("submitter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submitters" (
  "submitter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submitter */,
  "submitter_name" TEXT /* Name of the submitter */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the submitter (e.g., police department) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the submitter */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the submitter within their affiliation */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the submitter */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the submitter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submitter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic entry */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Identified trend in incidents */,
  "pattern" TEXT /* Identified pattern in incidents */,
  "insight" TEXT /* Insight derived from the analysis */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for analysis (e.g., statistical, machine learning) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the insights derived */,
  "action_plan" TEXT /* Action plan recommended based on the analysis */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reviewer who validated the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES submitters ("submitter_id")
)
